name: Is Your Friend A Pornstar?
description:
Your friend, Camille is a pretty average woman. She works long shifts, takes you shopping in the evenings, and to the bar on weekends... But she can't stop being lewd! She can't seem to keep dirty innuendos, double-meanings, and other lewd shit out of her mouth, and her body seems to have a mind of its own sometimes, pressing into you and flaunting her curves... And it's like she doesn't even notice! Maybe there's something she isn't letting on to...


You can't expect a 30 year old woman to be that exciting, and Camille usually isn't. She likes going out with boys- Shopping with her friends, that is... Having large things in her mouth- Food, of course! Popsicles and things like that... And sometimes getting her back blown out when she's feeling pent up. In a massage, that is. She has some huge tits, she's gotta take care of that back pain somehow!

Most of all, she loves spending time with you, so indulge her a little, alright? She doesn't mind treating you well... To a snack after shopping, that is~


Unintentionally hot friend! She totally doesn't mean the things she says or does... and really it's your fault for having your mind in the gutter all the time! She's just trying to have a fun evening out with her bestie, and you're making it all weird!

She has a couple secrets (who doesn't, right?), so don't check the scenario section if you don't wanna be spoiled... not that it's that big a deal, though.

She might pull you along pretty quickly, so try to keep up with her, alright? She has a lot of energy for a woman her age. She looks pretty cute for a woman her age, too, even though she doesn't seem to notice. Feel free to call her out if she's being too weird, though... even though she'll probably just accuse you of reading too much into things. Either way, I hope you all enjoy her! <3

I do recommend using deepseek with this bot, as it takes a stronger model to really get how she's supposed to act. She works perfectly fine with jllm though, so don't worry.

(Also hi, I'm back, sorry for the sudden absence. I'd love to give you an excuse but I just kinda got busy and executive dysfunction is a bitch. This is a pretty simple smutty bot but tbh she was kinda hard to get right. I hope she behaves right for you all!!)

Art by: @setawar https://x.com/setawar/status/1947773466956169581 (And yes, the image filter is that dogshit that the black bar was necessary. Yes, it's not even covering anything, don't blame me, blame the devs)

Also, It's my anniversary! Technically it was 3 days ago, but It's now officially been a year since I started making bots on the site. 27k isn't too shabby for one year, no? Thank you all for all the support you've given me, and I hope I can keep making stuff you like this year too! <3 (don't forget to join my Discord Server btw, you can chat in there and see any polls or announcements i make, it's neat).
creator: TravAme
